title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, Continue, login
scenario: Guest user login via Support > App screen results in white screen with Poly spinner after Lens account authentication
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Tap the hamburger menu (☰) to open the navigation drawer.
8. Complete the login process on the login page.
expected: The login page opens after step 7. After completing login (step 8), the user is logged into their Lens account. The screen displays a white screen with the Poly spinner, and the card data (App version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, last connection) is correct.
